# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  ApplicationRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the application IAM role

Resources:
  UserFilesBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-user-files"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Disabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: User Files Bucket
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: User uploads and application backups

  ApplicationBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref UserFilesBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowApplicationAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ApplicationRoleArn
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt UserFilesBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${UserFilesBucket.Arn}/*"
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedConnections
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "*"
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt UserFilesBucket.Arn
              - !Sub "${UserFilesBucket.Arn}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref UserFilesBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BucketName"
